summary: Tested phone-first customer entry flow for jewelry business app. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend UI features verified working correctly: phone lookup, returning/new customer banners, reference locking, narration field, add phone functionality, and bill creation.
passed_tests: GET /api/customers/lookup-phone returns found=true for existing primary phone
GET /api/customers/lookup-phone returns found=false for unknown phone
GET /api/customers/lookup-phone returns found=false for invalid phone (<10 digits)
GET /api/customers/lookup-phone includes all_phones array in response
POST /api/customers/{id}/add-phone validates 10 digits (rejects 9 and 11 digits)
POST /api/customers/{id}/add-phone successfully adds new phone number
POST /api/customers/{id}/add-phone prevents duplicate primary phone (returns already_exists)
POST /api/bills creates bill with narration field stored correctly
POST /api/bills creates bill without narration (empty string)
POST /api/bills finds existing customer by phones array (multi-phone lookup)
GET /api/customers/search finds customer by partial phone match
Sales exec dashboard shows phone-first form: only phone input visible initially
Entering 10-digit existing phone shows GREEN 'Returning Customer: Name' banner
Returning customer: Name and Location auto-filled from lookup
Returning customer: Reference LOCKED to 'Repeat Customer' (not dropdown)
Returning customer: 'Add another phone number' link visible and functional
Entering 10-digit new phone shows BLUE 'New Customer' banner
New customer: Name and Location fields are EMPTY
New customer: Reference is DROPDOWN (not locked)
New customer: Add phone link NOT visible
Narration field visible and optional for all customers
Make Bill creates bill successfully and navigates to /bill/:id page
Bill page shows narration field if present

executive.method: OTP flow - get code from backend logs: grep 'OTP generated.*exec1' /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log | tail -1

seed_data_creation: Test customer created with phone 9876543210 (Test Customer, Test City) - multiple phones added via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone-first customer entry flow fully tested and working. Key test phone: 9876543210 (Test Customer). Backend endpoints: /api/customers/lookup-phone (GET), /api/customers/{id}/add-phone (POST). Bill creation stores narration field. Sales exec dashboard at /sales route after OTP login.

returns.customer: full customer data with all_phones array

add_phone_endpoint.validation: 10 digits required, prevents duplicates across all customers

bill_creation_with_narration.narration_field: Optional, stored as empty string if not provided
bill_creation_with_narration.customer_lookup: Searches both primary phone and phones array

returning_customer.banner: Green 'Returning Customer: Name' with visit count and location
returning_customer.add_phone: Link visible, expands to phone input with Add/Cancel

new_customer.banner: Blue 'New Customer — fill in details below'

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes shown in backend logs instead of actual SMS delivery
